name: HGNC
license_note: HGNC data are used for stable gene symbol and identifier normalization.
citation: HGNC (RRID:SCR_002827); recommended citation: Seal et al. 2025, Genenames.org: the HGNC and PGNC resources in 2026.

recommended_citations.title: Genenames.org: the HGNC and PGNC resources in 2026

notes: HGNC states that all HGNC data are freely available under Creative Commons Zero.
HGNC recommends attribution even though source attribution is not mandatory under CC0.

freshness.basis: Acceptable for public-candidate rendering; re-check HGNC citation and license pages before paper-grade use.

name: MONDO Disease Ontology
license_note: MONDO is used for disease identifiers and disease label context.
citation: Mondo Disease Ontology; recommended citation: Vasilevsky et al. 2025, Mondo: integrating disease terminology across communities.

recommended_citations.title: Mondo: integrating disease terminology across communities

notes: Mondo source metadata must be re-checked before a paper-grade release.

freshness.basis: Acceptable as disease identifier context for public-candidate rendering; re-check MONDO license and citation metadata before paper-grade use.

name: Open Targets Platform
license_note: Open Targets Platform data are used as source-attributed target-disease association evidence.
citation: Open Targets Platform; recommended citation: Buniello et al. 2025, Open Targets Platform: facilitating therapeutic hypotheses building in drug discovery.

recommended_citations.title: Open Targets Platform: facilitating therapeutic hypotheses building in drug discovery

notes: Open Targets Platform data is marked CC0 1.0 in the official licence documentation.
Open Targets expects attribution for online services, databases, or software according to good scientific practice.

freshness.basis: Acceptable for public-candidate rendering; re-check Open Targets license, terms, and citation pages before paper-grade use.

name: ClinVar
license_note: ClinVar gene-condition context is used as source-attributed evidence, not as clinical certainty.
license: NCBI public data; reuse subject to NCBI policies
citation: ClinVar; NCBI asks copied or distributed ClinVar data to attribute ClinVar and allows citing ClinVar publications such as PMID:29165669.

recommended_citations.title: ClinVar: improving access to variant interpretations and supporting evidence

notes: ClinVar asks that distributed or copied data attribute ClinVar as a data source.
ClinVar content is not direct diagnostic or medical decision-making guidance.

freshness.basis: Acceptable for public-candidate rendering; re-check NCBI/ClinVar attribution and reuse guidance before paper-grade use.

name: Experimental Factor Ontology
license_note: EFO is used as source-attributed originating ontology context for Open Targets disease nodes that are crosswalked to canonical MONDO disease ids.
citation: Experimental Factor Ontology; recommended citation: Malone et al. 2010, Modeling sample variables with an Experimental Factor Ontology.

recommended_citations.title: Modeling sample variables with an Experimental Factor Ontology

notes: EFO is developed by EMBL-EBI and is used by Open Targets for disease nodes.
EFO provenance is rendered as ontology/crosswalk context, not as gene-disease evidence.

freshness.basis: Acceptable as originating ontology context for public-candidate rendering; re-check EFO license and citation metadata before paper-grade use.
